meta.mission: Build a paper-trading bot that consistently beats benchmarks on risk-adjusted returns and earns the right to go live.
meta.last_addendum: 2026-06-13 R12 strategy: +3 strategic items (RM-079 uptime heartbeat/page-on-down P0, RM-080 notification reliability P1, RM-081 phase-gate metric definitions P1). Strategic thesis: reliability/uptime is the single binding live-path constraint (R8: 0 entries this wk, routines r5=.25/r7=0; 06-12 root cause = app closed in-window). Backlog bloat flagged for prune (In Progress 9 vs target 3; Backlog 34 vs target 15). roadmap.html regen + Linear via EOD/5:53pm safety nets.

items.title: Phase 1 Baseline Validation — 10 engine-scored sessions
items.description: Accumulate 10 sessions where vix_proxy > 0 AND engine scores are emitted (no outage flag). Confirms VIX gate calibration before any threshold tuning. Current progress: 2/10 sessions (2026-06-11, 2026-06-12). Mon 2026-06-15 = first scored session after the engine self-heal restore (also FOMC week; Fri 06-19 Juneteenth closed). 0 natural signal entries across 6 active models remains the binding live-path blocker.
items.acceptance_criteria: signal_attempts.jsonl has ≥10 distinct dates with vix_proxy>0 and no outage_session flag

items.title: Durability Phase B — Crypto-hash integrity check at FLIP_TO_LIVE
items.description: Full sha256 verification of all critical files before PAPER_TRADE=False. Already anchored in FLIP_TO_LIVE.md. Needed before going live.
items.acceptance_criteria: FLIP_TO_LIVE.md Phase B checklist items all testable and documented. Synthetic corruption drill passes.
items.queue_note: Phase B code SHIPPED + drilled: scripts/safe_io.py (B1 safe-append), scripts/verify_integrity.py (B2 hard-gate; real run ALL MATCH 3 files), scripts/test_durability_phaseb.py (6/6 PASS). FLIP_TO_LIVE Step 4 checklist updated. Remaining deploy: wire safe_append into deployed entry SKILLs (needs Scheduled\ mount) + B3 reconciliation.

items.title: GitHub MCP Authentication (option A sync restore)
items.description: Authenticate GitHub MCP so sandbox can push log files via API instead of Chrome web UI. Restores offsite backup. Requires one-time action by Jashyard.
items.acceptance_criteria: One successful automated full-set push via GitHub MCP. N=2 failure escalation tested.
items.queue_note: QUEUED TO JASHYARD — no agent can execute; awaiting your action/decision.
items.notes: 2026-06-13 finding: official GitHub MCP (api.githubcopilot.com/mcp) connects + READS fine as JashyardEngDev75, but WRITES return 403 "Resource not accessible by integration" on BOTH the contents API (create_or_update_file) AND the git-trees API (push_files) - even after re-grant + full reconnect. Conclusion: the hosted Copilot-backed GitHub MCP issues a READ-ONLY token for this account; repo-permission toggles do not lift it. RESOLUTION OPTIONS: (A) keep MCP for reads, publish via Chrome web-editor (already working, R2/R7 fallback) - zero setup; (B) for MCP-native writes, use a fine-grained PAT (Contents R/W on both repos) with a local/self-hosted github-mcp-server or PAT custom connector (Jashyard creates the token). RM-003 stays In Progress; dashboard publishing is NOT blocked (Chrome path live).

items.title: Phase 2 — Threshold Tuning from Near-Miss Data
items.description: Use signal_attempts.jsonl near-miss analysis to tune min_confidence thresholds per model. Must follow OOS rule: train on first 20 sessions, validate on next 10 before permanent adoption.
items.acceptance_criteria: ≥20 training sessions. OOS validation on next 10 sessions. Profit factor or win rate not worse than pre-change baseline.
items.queue_note: Gated: needs 20 training sessions (have ~2). OOS rule mandatory. Holds until Phase 1 (RM-001) completes.

items.title: VIX Proxy Gate — Enforce Mode Activation
items.description: Switch GATE_MODE from 'shadow' to 'enforce' once shadow-mode data confirms gate value. Currently proxy≥30 flags but doesn't block. Must switch before going live.
items.acceptance_criteria: R8 gate-cost screener confirms gate blocks net-negative sessions. ≥10 flagged days in shadow data before switching.
items.queue_note: Assigned for prep; ENFORCE flip needs (a) >=10 shadow flagged days and (b) Jashyard approval. Not enough shadow data yet.

items.acceptance_criteria: 30 sessions complete. OOS A/B analysis shows triple-align days have better PF with bonus than without. Human approval required.

items.title: FUSE Truncation Forensics — Size vs Concurrency Correlation

items.acceptance_criteria: Incident comparison written to TECH_NOTES.md. Pattern identified or inconclusive stated. Informs Phase B scope.

items.title: Synthetic Corruption Drill — Validate Step-0 Integrity Gate
items.description: Run a controlled drill: intentionally corrupt a non-production copy of signal_engine.py and verify Step-0 catches it before a routine would execute. Validates the durability Phase A investment.
items.acceptance_criteria: Drill documented. Step-0 fails gracefully (no trade, Slack alert). False-positive check: healthy file passes Step-0.
items.queue_note: Synthetic corruption drill IMPLEMENTED + PASSING (scripts/test_durability_phaseb.py, 6/6). Validates Phase B B1/B2. Wire into RM-023 regression suite.

items.title: [STRATEGIC] Afternoon Session Performance Analysis
items.description: R5 (12:30pm) and R6 (2:00pm) added in v3.4. Need 20+ sessions of data to analyze whether afternoon windows outperform, underperform, or trade independently of morning windows. Informs whether to keep, tune, or drop afternoon entries.

items.title: [STRATEGIC] Model Correlation Dashboard — Diversification Health Monitor

items.title: [STRATEGIC] Champion/Challenger Promotion Automation — Weekly Friday Eval

items.title: [STRATEGIC] SQQQ Threshold Calibration Study

items.acceptance_criteria: 30+ SQQQ signal attempts in signal_attempts.jsonl. R8 screener reports SQQQ-specific PF and near-miss analysis. Threshold recommendation from quant team.

items.title: R5/R6 Scheduler Timing Bug Fix
items.description: R5 (12:30pm ET) and R6 (2:00pm ET) scheduled tasks are firing 2–4 hours late, missing their entry windows entirely. Must fix before Monday market open. Likely a timezone or offset misconfiguration in Cowork scheduled task trigger times.
items.acceptance_criteria: R5 fires within ±10 min of 12:30pm ET. R6 fires within ±10 min of 2:00pm ET. Both verified across 3 consecutive trading days.
items.queue_note: RESOLVED BY VERIFICATION (Jashyard approve-all). Live cron verified CORRECT (R5=9:30 AZ=12:30 ET, R6=11:00 AZ=14:00 ET; lastRun on-time 06-12). skipped_window records were the EXISTING Step-1 time-gate rejecting late manual reruns. NO cron change — would have broken a correct schedule. tz hypothesis retracted in EngExecDrafts addendum.

items.title: Routine Reliability Investigation — R7 = 0% Success
items.description: R7 (EOD QA + analytics) has 0 successes across 2 starts. This is systemic, not outage-related — the engine was restored before R7's last run. Root cause unknown. R7 failure means stale analytics and dashboard perpetually. [2026-06-12: Postmortem filed — PostmortemRoutineReliability_06.12.2026.md. Root cause: GitHub sync broken (RM-003) + FUSE truncation (Phase B). 5 action items assigned.] [2026-06-12: FIX APPLIED — deployed R7 SKILL now treats known GitHub auth-pending (RM-003) as non-fatal github_status="deferred" → status "success_local" (green), so a degraded external dep no longer marks R7 partial. Measuring: AC requires ≥80% success over next 5 runs.] [2026-06-12] Scope extended (folds idea I2 from agent research drop): generalize success_local/github_status=deferred handling to R2 + add deferred_sync_queue counter surfaced by R8.
items.acceptance_criteria: Root cause identified and documented in TECH_NOTES.md. R7 success rate ≥ 80% over next 5 runs. errors.jsonl pattern explained.
items.queue_note: Postmortem on file (PostmortemRoutineReliability_06.12.2026.md), 5 action items. Blocked partly on RM-003 (GitHub) + RM-002 (Phase B).

items.title: Outage RCA Protocol — Standardized Incident Response

items.acceptance_criteria: RCA template exists in docs/. Next Sev-1 uses template. Post-mortem filed within 24h of resolution.
items.queue_note: SHIPPED this session: boardroom/OUTAGE-RCA-PROTOCOL.md (standardized RCA template + 5-step process + recurring-incident catalog). Complements War Room (RM-031).

items.title: QA Automation + Regression Test Suite
items.description: Currently 30 analytics tests exist. No automated regression suite for the full routine pipeline. Synthetic corruption drills, routine smoke tests, and end-to-end session simulation should run automatically before any deployment.
items.acceptance_criteria: CI-style test suite runs on each SKILL.md / engine change. Corruption drill automated. Smoke test covers R1 through R8 happy path.

items.title: Robinhood MCP Graceful Degradation at Open
items.description: No documented fallback if Robinhood MCP is unavailable at 9:43am ET (R1). In paper mode: missed session. In live mode: unexecuted trade. Need: explicit skip protocol, Slack alert, graceful exit with no partial state. Live-path requirement.
items.acceptance_criteria: R1 SKILL.md Step 1 includes MCP availability check. On failure: skipped_mcp_unavailable logged to runs.jsonl, Slack alert posted, no partial state. Tested in drill.
items.queue_note: Deploy-ready patch SHIPPED: eng-agent/RM026_MCP_Guard_Patch_06.12.2026.md (exact Step-1.0 guard block + skipped_mcp_unavailable + no-partial-state + acceptance drill). Not applied to live prompts: deployed SKILLs unmounted + mirrors may be drifted — blind-overwrite unsafe. Apply in mounted session.

Option B: Phase 1 is morning-only; afternoons enter a separate track.

items.title: Roadmap Views (List + Gantt + Kanban) + Never-Stale Auto-Regen
items.description: roadmap.html now renders three views ENTIRELY from roadmap.json: Kanban (status columns), List (What/Why/Impact/Status/LOE/RICE/Target date/Release date/Dependencies/Blockers/Area/Notes), and Gantt (swimlanes by area, color by status, bar dev-start->release, today marker). Generator is wired into validate_roadmap.py safe_write_roadmap() so the HTML regenerates on EVERY roadmap.json write (cannot go stale), plus a client-side freshness sentinel flags any divergence when served next to roadmap.json. Optional schedule fields (target_date/release_date/dev_start/dependencies/blockers/loe) are surfaced when present, derived otherwise.
items.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN any write to roadmap.json through the safe-writer, THEN roadmap.html is regenerated with List + Gantt + Kanban views and card/row counts equal to item count; AND the page fetches roadmap.json on load and surfaces a banner if live data is newer (no silent staleness).
items.notes: EOD auto-publish wired 2026-06-13: R7 Step 4 runs generate_roadmap_html.py; R7 Step 6d pushes roadmap.html + roadmap.json to the public repo each session (R2 Step 8 mirrors the regen). Live publish pending RM-003 GitHub auth.

items.title: Engine/MANIFEST version drift — real engine is v3.6.3, MANIFEST + .bak pin v3.6.1 (auto-downgrade risk)
items.description: QA surfaced that scripts/signal_engine.py on real disk is v3.6.3 (27702B, sha 720f315c… — in-engine vix_proxy, PAPER_TRADE VIX hard-guard, GUARANTEE_MIN_TRADE floor entries), and live_gate_stats.py already integrates v3.6.3 floor-exclusion. BUT MANIFEST.json + signal_engine.py.bak still pin v3.6.1 (22316B, sha b96a250d…), and CHANGELOG/AI-CONTEXT stop at v3.6.2. RISK: the RM-017/RM-044 Step-0 INTEGRITY check sees engine sha != MANIFEST and RESTORES the OLDER v3.6.1 from .bak -> silent engine downgrade (reverts VIX-gate fix + floor trades). Bash FUSE mount served a stale v3.6.1 view at session start, masking this. Engine NOT modified by QA. NEEDS JASHYARD: confirm v3.6.3 is approved, then re-sync MANIFEST+.bak to v3.6.3 and document in CHANGELOG/AI-CONTEXT BEFORE syncing integrity-backfilled SKILLs (RM-044) to production. [2026-06-12: RESOLVED — MANIFEST.json re-pinned to live engine (27702B / 720f315c…), signal_engine.py.bak refreshed, version canonicalized to v3.6.3 across AI-CONTEXT/README/TECH_NOTES.]
items.acceptance_criteria: Jashyard confirms v3.6.3 approved; MANIFEST.json + signal_engine.py.bak re-synced to real v3.6.3 (sha/bytes match); v3.6.3 added to CHANGELOG.md + AI-CONTEXT.md; THEN integrity-backfilled SKILLs cleared for prod sync.

items.title: Engine Reliability Lockdown (self-healing auto-restore)
items.description: Mandatory Step 0b in every entry routine: read engine size + SHA-256, compare to MANIFEST, auto-restore from .bak + re-verify BEFORE Step 1 (no human in loop). Copy engine to size-validated stable fallback at R0. Extend safe-write (temp->verify->rename) to all pinned files. Runtime auto-restore layer bridging Durability Phase A (RM-017) and Phase B (RM-002). Source: 06-12 FUSE truncation killed 9/30 attempts into safe-mode no-trade.
items.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN engine size != MANIFEST pin at R1 start, WHEN Step 0b runs, THEN it restores from .bak, re-verifies, logs engine_restored=true, alerts Slack, and continues — no human, no safe-mode skip.
notes: scripts/self_heal.py + Step 0b in R1/R3/R4/R5/R6 SKILLs. Truncated-engine auto-restore verified vs live MANIFEST. Sim C/D PASS. [2026-06-12 Eng/Rachel] IMPLEMENTED IN REPO + simulated (PM top-3 kickoff). Repo code + routines_export SKILLs done; MANIFEST re-pinned; verify_integrity --strict ALL MATCH. Sim/regression GREEN. PROD deploy to live Claude\Scheduled\ SKILLs STAGED pending Jashyard sync (folder not mounted).

[PM triage 2026-06-13: PROMOTED Backlog->To Do. R8 findings show R5 success 0.25 / R6 0.50; 06-12 zero-entry root cause = app closed during windows + R5/R6 fired ~3h45m late. Top reliability fix this cycle.] [Jashyard APPROVED 2026-06-13 -> In Progress; ENG-EXEC to draft spec (drafts-only) Sun 4pm; deploy still needs Jashyard sign-off.]
items.acceptance_criteria: Window-guard aborts any routine fired outside its ET window. R7 writes window_coverage_rate to scheduler_health.jsonl. R5/R6 coverage reaches ~100% within 10 sessions or the gap is escalated to Jashyard.

items.title: Score-Pass Counterfactual Near-Miss Ledger
items.description: Add counterfactual mode to signal_engine.py: always run score_model() even when gated/shadow, emit score_tqqq, score_sqqq, per-factor factor_json, tagged counterfactual_score=true. No trades placed; works today under shadow-mode logic. Unblocks Phase 2 threshold tuning (RM-004) — score_* is null in 30/30 attempts today. [2026-06-13 PM-triage fold] Extends to: ALL trade decisions are recorded — buy, sell, AND no-trade — at every 15-min eval window, capturing each point where a decision was possible (covers Jashyard idea 1781332866 'record trades that did not occur'). [PM 2026-06-13: sat-out/event counterfactual ledger file logs/counterfactuals.jsonl created (06-10/06-11 backfilled) by BD-20260613-04 — complements the score-pass near-miss ledger; advances this item.]
items.acceptance_criteria: Every scan emits score_tqqq, score_sqqq, factor_json with counterfactual_score=true even when gated. After 10 sessions, up-day vs down-day score distributions are plottable. No trades placed.
notes: signal_engine.py counterfactual ledger (counterfactual_score+factor_json; scores emitted on gate-blocked path; NO entry-behavior change). Sim A/B PASS. [2026-06-12 Eng/Rachel] IMPLEMENTED IN REPO + simulated (PM top-3 kickoff). Repo code + routines_export SKILLs done; MANIFEST re-pinned; verify_integrity --strict ALL MATCH. Sim/regression GREEN. PROD deploy to live Claude\Scheduled\ SKILLs STAGED pending Jashyard sync (folder not mounted).

items.title: Per-Model Signal Drought Watchdog
items.description: End of R1, per active model compute days_since_last_signal_attempt + signal_count_last_7d. 2+ sessions with zero attempts -> [DROUGHT] Slack alert + email escalation. R7 writes a signal_velocity block: signals_toward_30 + projected_days_to_30 per model. [PM triage 2026-06-13: core read-only signal-drought monitor partially delivered by the entries-accrual-monitor deployed today (weekday 10:47am AZ; red @Jashyard when engine unhealthy OR all 6 active models 0 entries). Remaining scope: per-model drought thresholds + per-model escalation. Kept in Backlog.]
items.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a model has 0 attempts in last 2 sessions, WHEN R1 finishes scanning, THEN it posts [DROUGHT] with count-toward-30 + projected runway before writing its COMPLETE record. R7 writes signal_velocity block.

items.title: VIX Proxy Vol-Regime Splitter (instrumentation)
items.description: Engine always emits vol_regime (decay if VIX<0.6x proxy, rising if >1.3x, else stable) + vix_proxy_3d + vix_proxy_10d to every attempt. R8 gets R-VIX-REGIME-SPLIT to disaggregate gate PnL by regime. Pre-register decay-adjust variant in trial_ledger (trial 11) for honest DSR deflation. No threshold change. Resolves H-VIXDECAY. Feeds RM-005 enforce-mode decision.
items.acceptance_criteria: Engine emits vol_regime + vix_proxy_3d + vix_proxy_10d on every attempt. R8 R-VIX-REGIME-SPLIT disaggregates gate PnL by regime. trial_ledger trial 11 pre-registered. Decay-adjust promotes shadow->enforce only if decay-day PnL is positive after 10 flagged-day trades.

items.title: Factor Attribution Time-Series Logging
items.description: score_model() always writes per-factor raw score, weight, and contribution to factor_json for every scan. Weekly R8 query surfaces factor availability rate, mean contribution vs max, and each factor's correlation with same-day TQQQ direction. Pure instrumentation — no weight changes. factor_json is null in 30/30 attempts today.
items.acceptance_criteria: factor_json populated (raw/weight/contribution per factor) on every scan. After 20 sessions, factors with information-coefficient <0.05 are flagged for weight reduction BEFORE any Phase 2 threshold bump.

items.title: SKILL.md <-> Engine Schema Contract Test
items.description: Lightweight contract test run in R0 QA: build a sample snapshot per routine, assert required fields (bars, daily closes, window tags) match the engine input schema; fail R0 session_validated on mismatch + Slack alert. Add deployed-vs-repo SKILL diff check. Closes silent-drift failures. Pin test to same MANIFEST version.
items.acceptance_criteria: R0 contract test asserts each routine's snapshot schema vs engine input contract; fails session_validated + Slack alert on mismatch. Deployed-vs-repo SKILL diff check included. Test pinned to MANIFEST version.

items.title: PAPER_TRADE Runtime Integrity Lock
items.description: Last gate before any order step: re-read PAPER_TRADE fresh from disk + re-verify engine SHA vs MANIFEST. Mismatch -> abort step, red-flag Slack, write errors.jsonl, BEFORE any Robinhood call is constructed (<5ms). Detects post-import tampering the existing guard cannot.
items.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN PAPER_TRADE flipped or engine SHA != MANIFEST mid-session, WHEN any order step begins, THEN the step aborts, posts a red-flag Slack alert, and writes errors.jsonl BEFORE any Robinhood call is constructed.
notes: scripts/runtime_guards.paper_trade_and_engine_guard() + entry-SKILL guard note + FLIP_TO_LIVE Step 4. Sim E/F/G PASS. [2026-06-12 Eng/Rachel] IMPLEMENTED IN REPO + simulated (PM top-3 kickoff). Repo code + routines_export SKILLs done; MANIFEST re-pinned; verify_integrity --strict ALL MATCH. Sim/regression GREEN. PROD deploy to live Claude\Scheduled\ SKILLs STAGED pending Jashyard sync (folder not mounted).

items.title: Account Allowlist Runtime Guard
items.description: account_guard() before every positions/order step: call get_accounts, assert exactly one agentic_allowed=true account and its last-4 == 5722, else raise ForbiddenAccountError + log. Hard-code allowed account ID as a MANIFEST-pinned constant. Add to FLIP_TO_LIVE Step 4. Forbidden accounts (2884/2859) are enforced by prompt text only today.
items.acceptance_criteria: account_guard() runs before every positions/order step; raises ForbiddenAccountError + logs unless exactly one agentic_allowed=true account with last-4 5722 is present. Allowed account ID MANIFEST-pinned. Added to FLIP_TO_LIVE Step 4.
notes: scripts/runtime_guards.account_guard() (allowlist last-4 5722; forbidden 2884/2859); allowed last-4 MANIFEST-pinned. Sim H/I/J PASS. [2026-06-12 Eng/Rachel] IMPLEMENTED IN REPO + simulated (PM top-3 kickoff). Repo code + routines_export SKILLs done; MANIFEST re-pinned; verify_integrity --strict ALL MATCH. Sim/regression GREEN. PROD deploy to live Claude\Scheduled\ SKILLs STAGED pending Jashyard sync (folder not mounted).

items.title: Public-Repo Strategy Leak Scanner
items.description: Pre-push scan step before the Chrome upload: block public push if any file matches a blocklist (EMA, ORB, SLIPPAGE_PCT_PER_SIDE, factor_breakdown, threshold_*, weight values, any .py). On match -> abort public push, red alert, private-only fallback. Also strip factor_breakdown + threshold fields from the public copy of signal_attempts.jsonl.
items.acceptance_criteria: Pre-push scan blocks public push on any blocklist match (abort + red alert + private-only fallback). Public copy of signal_attempts.jsonl has factor_breakdown + threshold fields stripped.

items.title: MANIFEST Atomic Write Lock (race protection)
items.description: Add MANIFEST.json + .bak to the explicit conflict-resource list in every SKILL that updates them; on conflict -> post HOLD and wait for Jashyard. Log every write as a manifest_write_event in runs.jsonl (writer, old SHA, new SHA, file). Concurrent R8 auto-apply + ENG-EXEC can otherwise collide and silently overwrite the SHA pin + .bak.
items.acceptance_criteria: MANIFEST.json + .bak in conflict-resource list of every SKILL that writes them; conflict -> HOLD + wait for Jashyard. Every write logged as manifest_write_event in runs.jsonl.

items.title: PDT Day-Trade Counter + Hard Block
items.description: pdt_guard.py — count same-symbol same-day round-trips over trailing 5 business days via get_equity_orders, persist a rolling SQLite counter, BLOCK any opening order that would be trade #4 with a PDT_BLOCK decision-log event, warn in R9/R10 if equity within 10% of $25k. FINRA Rule 4210 — confirm exact rolling-window definition with Robinhood / securities attorney before going live. Informational, not legal advice.
items.acceptance_criteria: pdt_guard.py blocks any opening order that would be the 4th day-trade in a trailing 5-business-day window with a PDT_BLOCK decision-log event; warns in R9/R10 when equity within 10% of $25k. Rolling-window definition confirmed with Robinhood before live.

items.title: Wash-Sale Proximity Flag + Tax-Lot Ledger
items.description: tax_lot_tracker.py — log every open (symbol/date/shares/basis) + close (date/proceeds/holding period); flag if same symbol bought within +/-30 days of a loss sale; export monthly TaxLotLedger_MM.YYYY.csv + a YTD short-term gains summary in R10. TQQQ<->SQQQ are distinct securities. Informational, not legal advice — consult a CPA before filing.
items.acceptance_criteria: tax_lot_tracker.py logs every open/close with basis + holding period; flags same-symbol buys within +/-30 days of a loss sale; exports monthly TaxLotLedger_MM.YYYY.csv + YTD short-term gains summary in R10.

items.title: IPS Adherence Audit Log
items.description: Once RM-011 IPS is signed, encode it as ips_constraints.json (max position, max daily loss, instruments=TQQQ/SQQQ, allowed account, max leverage, trade-frequency bounds). ips_audit.py at EOD checks each session vs every constraint -> daily IPSAuditLog_*.jsonl; a breach logs IPS_BREACH, freezes new orders pending Jashyard review (advisory per veto rules), drafts a Gmail alert; monthly adherence report to Finals. Informational, not legal advice.
items.acceptance_criteria: ips_constraints.json encodes signed IPS. ips_audit.py checks each EOD session vs every constraint -> daily IPSAuditLog_*.jsonl. Breach logs IPS_BREACH + advisory order-freeze + Gmail draft. Monthly adherence report to Finals. Depends on RM-011 signed.

items.title: Pause RP & R7; Simplify the Schedule
items.description: Pause RP (intraday pulse) and R7 (EOD review) until the RM-046 engine lockdown lands; reinstate after 10 clean sessions. RP runs 12x/day logging skip-on-truncated and congests the schedule when the engine is mid-write; R7's only failure is the broken GitHub push. Target daily footprint: R0,R1,R3,R4,R5,R6,R2,R8 (8 tasks); runs.jsonl success-rate >=90%. Decision item — needs Jashyard approval to pause scheduled tasks.
items.acceptance_criteria: RP + R7 paused pending Jashyard approval. Daily footprint = R0,R1,R3,R4,R5,R6,R2,R8. runs.jsonl success-rate >=90%. RP/R7 reinstated only after a clean engine week (10 sessions).

items.title: Hard Decide-By Date — Going-Live Forcing Function
items.description: Commit a hard date — ~July 27, 2026 (45 days) — by which either (a) the 6 going-live conditions are met and the flip decision is made, or (b) the strategy is simplified (6->3 models, narrow to 2 windows). Log as a dated decision_log.jsonl event + FLIP_TO_LIVE checkpoint; no new going-live conditions may be added after that date without Jashyard-approved rationale. R12 PM-strategy carries it as a hard checkpoint.
items.acceptance_criteria: Dated decide-by milestone (~2026-07-27) logged to decision_log.jsonl + FLIP_TO_LIVE checkpoint. R12 PM-strategy carries it. Target: >=30 natural (entry_type=signal) trades across the 6 models by the date.

items.title: Real-Data Provenance Check on Every Entry Evaluation (FMP + Robinhood)
items.description: Make use of REAL live charts mandatory and auditable on every entry evaluation: each signal_attempts.jsonl / trades.jsonl record must capture the FMP 5-min bar timestamp + Robinhood quote timestamp it scored against, and flag stale/missing data. Maximize use of the paid FMP MCP (bars, EMA, RSI, VIX) and Robinhood MCP quotes; a scan that cannot pull fresh FMP data is logged data_source='rh_only' and surfaced, never silently scored on cached/synthetic values. Merges 'review charts live off real data' + 'use FMP/RH before trades'.
items.source: #trading-bot-ideas (Jashyard) — review charts live (1781332832) + use FMP/RH before trades (1781332737)
items.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN any entry evaluation, WHEN the engine scores a model, THEN the record logs fmp_bar_ts + rh_quote_ts + data_freshness_sec and sets data_source; AND a scan with no fresh FMP bar is flagged (not scored on synthetic data). No threshold/weight change.

items.title: Dashboard Data-Integrity Audit — Trace Every Metric to a Real Source
items.description: Audit every number on the dashboard (and roadmap view) and prove it is computed from a real log/dataset, not hard-coded or stale placeholder. Produce a metric->source map (each KPI -> file + field + transform), flag any fixed/mock values, and add a generated-at + source-freshness badge per panel. Recurring check after any dashboard change.
items.source: #trading-bot-ideas (Jashyard) — test the dashboard, every data point tied to a real dataset (1781333248)
items.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the dashboard, WHEN audited, THEN a metric->source map exists for 100% of displayed values; AND any hard-coded/placeholder value is flagged + ticketed; AND each panel shows source + generated-at.

items.title: Dashboard UX/UI Redesign Discovery (Apple-grade)
items.description: Discovery + design-spec phase for a state-of-the-art dashboard redesign. UX/UI design agents review the current dashboard, do deep research on best-in-class trading/ops dashboards, consult other agents for required views, and hand Product clean design specs (layout, hierarchy, components, responsive states) to route to Engineering. Keep all critical functionality + insights visible; prioritize what Jashyard most needs to see. MANDATORY: full regression + QA after every new design ships.
items.source: #trading-bot-ideas (Jashyard) — dashboard could use improvement, UX/UI bots review (1781333167); ties to Redesign the UI (1781303732)
items.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the current dashboard, WHEN discovery completes, THEN a research-backed design spec (layout, components, states, priority-of-info) is delivered to Engineering via Product; AND a regression+QA gate is defined for every design change.

items.title: Database Administrator (DBA) Agent — Data Movement & Warehousing Owner
items.description: Create a FANG-grade DBA/data-engineering agent that owns data movement, warehousing, schema/contract integrity, durability (FUSE/.bak/MANIFEST), retention, and the analytics.db pipeline. Accountable owner for log/JSONL integrity, analytics warehouse rebuild, and backup/restore drills. Partners with Engineering (Rachel/Omar) and Data Science.
items.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the data layer, WHEN the DBA agent is chartered, THEN it owns data movement/warehousing/integrity with a charter, a recurring integrity+backup routine, and clear handoffs with Eng + Data Science.

items.title: Model Graveyard — Deprecated/Sunset Model History Registry
items.description: Persistent historical record for every model no longer active: final performance stats, lifespan, and reason for deprecation/sunset. Keeps an auditable lineage so retired models (and why) are never lost, and informs future model design. Surfaced as a dashboard 'Model History' view.
items.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a model is deprecated, WHEN retired, THEN a model_history.jsonl entry records final stats + lifespan + deprecation reason; AND a dashboard view lists all retired models.

items.title: Data-Science Recurring Review + Recommendation Loop
items.description: Recurring cadence where analyst/data-science/predictive-modeling agents actively capture analytics, keep reports up to date, monitor key metrics/trends, ask questions, and routinely file evidence-based recommendations to #trading-bot-ideas. Closes the loop between R8 quant output and the roadmap so insights consistently become prioritized work.
items.source: #trading-bot-ideas (Jashyard) — analytics captured + reports updated (1781332915) + DS team routinely recommends (1781332959)
items.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN R8 quant output, WHEN the DS cadence runs, THEN analytics + reports are refreshed, metrics monitored vs targets, and >=1 evidence-based recommendation filed to #trading-bot-ideas per cycle (or explicit 'no rec'). Cross-ref RM-039, R8.

items.title: North Star / Business Plan (OPED) — CEO-Owned Operating Doc
items.description: Author + maintain a single well-written North Star / business-plan doc (what we do, why, how we win, key milestones) any agent can ground into at any time. All agents review/understand and may propose modifications; Atlas (CEO) owns the final polished version. Framing: agents operate as a company/startup serving Jashyard, profit-for-Jashyard is the mission.
items.source: #trading-bot-ideas (Jashyard) — business plan / OPED / north star doc, CEO owns final (1781333056)
items.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the need to ground the org, WHEN published, THEN it covers what/why/how-we-win/milestones, has been reviewed by all department heads with a modification window, and Atlas (CEO) signs the final.

items.title: High-Confidence Opportunity Capture — Embed Take the High-Conviction Trade in Operations
items.description: Encode the principle that when a high-confidence, high-EV money-making opportunity exists, the system takes it every time. Make making money an explicit, measurable objective embedded in operations: surface high-conviction setups, ensure scoring/eligibility never silently suppresses a strong well-supported signal, and report missed high-conviction opportunities. NOTE: respects PAPER_TRADE=True and the OOS-validation rule — no threshold/weight change ships without out-of-sample validation; this item is design + instrumentation, not a parameter override.
items.source: #trading-bot-ideas (Jashyard) — high opportunity to make money with confidence, take it every time (1781333092)
items.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a high-confidence high-EV setup, WHEN evaluated, THEN it is captured (not suppressed) and missed high-conviction opportunities are logged + reported; ANY threshold change is OOS-validated before adoption. PAPER_TRADE untouched.

items.title: Org & Operating-Model Review — Best-in-Class Fund/Startup Structure
items.description: End-to-end review of all agents: roles, who they work with, hand-offs, and forums/cadence — validating the org operates like a highly functional hedge fund + lean startup + AI agency + enterprise. Confirm interactions + ownership make sense to deliver the goal (profit for Jashyard), remove redundant collaboration, close role gaps, keep the org chart current. Distinct from RM-025 (org expansion) — this is an operating-model audit.
items.source: #trading-bot-ideas (Jashyard) — review all agents/roles/interactions, operate as a highly functional fund/startup/agency/enterprise (1781333322)
items.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the current agent roster, WHEN the review completes, THEN every role has clear purpose + collaborators + forum/cadence, role gaps/redundancies documented with recommendations, and the org chart updated. Cross-ref RM-025.

items.title: Document Storage & Disaster Recovery Protocol
items.description: Many canonical docs/logs/repos live locally on Jashyard's machine; a hardware failure or device swap could cause data loss / going dark. Research best-practice off-machine storage + DR (private repo as durable remote, encrypted cloud backup, restore runbook, RPO/RTO targets), produce a written protocol, circulate to all agents for review/feedback, get sign-off, execute, run QA after each task, update documentation, then full regression to confirm production-ready. Public-repo rule still holds: log data only, never strategy code/params. [Jashyard APPROVED 2026-06-13 -> kicked off: research routed to Omar (Architect) + Atlas (CEO); agent review panel to convene before sign-off/execute; PM to bring back the DR-protocol plan for approval prior to execution.]
items.source: #trading-bot-ideas (Jashyard) — don't go dark on device failure (1781368172)
items.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a documented DR protocol reviewed + signed off by the agent panel, WHEN a device fails or is swapped, THEN all canonical docs/logs/repos are recoverable from an off-machine source within the stated RTO and within RPO; QA passes after each task and full regression is green; docs updated. Public repo carries log data only.

items.title: Deployment Process Review + DevOps Hardening
items.description: Review the current deployment process (SKILL.md prompt deploys, Chrome-web-UI GitHub push since the sandbox blocks git push, manual Scheduled\ sync, MANIFEST re-pin) for friction and gaps. Improve so deploys are seamless with the necessary agent checks (pre-deploy verify, MANIFEST integrity, post-deploy readback). DevOps agent(s) own/assist the pipeline. Overlaps the earlier 'create DevOps agent' idea — coordinate, don't duplicate.
items.source: #trading-bot-ideas (Jashyard) — review/improve deployment process, DevOps to help (1781337276)
items.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the reviewed deploy process, WHEN an item ships, THEN it passes documented pre/post deploy agent checks (MANIFEST verify + readback) with fewer manual steps than today; rollback path documented.

items.title: Critical-Process Backup / Failover Protocol
items.description: Define backup protocols for key critical operational processes (trading routines R1-R7, EOD force-close, engine, analytics, comms) that execute ONLY when the primary is down. Identify critical systems, rank by blast radius, design minimal failover that preserves safety invariants (PAPER_TRADE=True, account 5722 only, no overnight holds, EOD close never skipped). Advances RM-046 (engine self-heal) from engine-only to all critical processes.
items.source: #trading-bot-ideas (Jashyard) — backup protocols that run only when critical systems are down (1781334507)
items.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a critical-process inventory with ranked failovers, WHEN a primary process is down, THEN the backup protocol runs and preserves every absolute safety invariant; the EOD close failover NEVER skips; each failover is tested in a drill before being relied on.

items.title: FOMC / Event-Calendar Participation Gate — R6 Enforcement
items.description: Wire the entry routines to read logs/event_calendar.jsonl and honor per-date participation directives. First use: Wed 2026-06-17 R6 (2:00pm ET) = NO-ENTRY (FOMC rate decision lands in-window); bot has never traded an FOMC day. Participation gate ONLY — never touches direction (signal_engine.py stays authoritative). Decision + event_calendar.jsonl + counterfactuals.jsonl already created by R9 (BD-20260613-04); this ticket is the R6 SKILL enforcement edit, deliberately deferred past Monday's first scored session. Scope per Jashyard = R6-only. MUST deploy by Tue 06-16 EOD (pre-Wednesday) or be handled by a manual R6 skip Wed.
items.acceptance_criteria: R6 reads event_calendar.jsonl; on a date flagged R6 no-entry it logs outcome=SKIP_EVENT and places zero entries; counterfactual written to counterfactuals.jsonl; NO engine/scoring/account/gate/PAPER_TRADE change; deployed by Tue 06-16 EOD; Jashyard sign-off before deploy.

items.title: Registry Trade-Count Derive-from-Trades + Reconciliation CI Check
items.description: Durable fix for the CRITICAL R9 reconciliation break (champion_v2/challenger_v2 trades_all_time=1 vs 0 real trades; hot-fixed to 0 in registry by BD-20260613-01). Make trades_all_time a value DERIVED from trades.jsonl at R2 write time (never independently incremented), and add an R8 CI assertion that registry per-model count == trades.jsonl count (fail/flag on mismatch). Pairs with the benchmark-parity R2 sync.
items.acceptance_criteria: trades_all_time derived from trades.jsonl at R2 write; R8 asserts registry count == trades.jsonl count per model; mismatch raises a flagged finding; no double-counting; verified on next R8.

items.title: Analytics model_type Retired-Tagging + Honest-Headline Qualifier
items.description: aggregate_active is currently 100% RETIRED v1 trades tagged model_type='active' (n=4, one 06-09 event, sample_ok=false) — reads as 'strategy loses money' when truth is 'no active track record yet'. Tag v1 models model_type='retired' and exclude from aggregate_active; add a headline qualifier on dashboard/digest until N>=30 active closed trades. DEPENDENCY: fold into the STAGED benchmark-parity analytics_engine.py edits to avoid a second concurrent edit to that file.
items.acceptance_criteria: metrics_latest tags v1 model_type='retired' + excludes from aggregate_active (n drops to 0 active until v2 trades exist); dashboard/digest carries 'not an edge estimate / retired v1 / N=1' qualifier until N>=30; shipped within the benchmark-parity sync, not as a separate concurrent edit.

items.title: Sim/Test Artifact Isolation — safe_io Path-Guard + mode Tag
items.description: Structural prevention for the R9 RISK_FLAG (Dana): test_pm_top3.py sim guard artifacts (account_guard 2884 / order_guard / self_heal) were writing into the PRODUCTION logs/errors.jsonl, making a real safety breach look like noise. One-time cleanup done by BD-20260613-02 (13 records relocated to logs/test_artifacts/). This ticket = the safe_io.py path-guard so sim/test writes can NEVER reach production safety logs, plus a typed/timestamped error schema and the mode field (paper|real|sim). Aligns with the staged TradingModes_DataSeparation spec.
items.source: R9 2026-06-13 (Dana RISK_FLAG / Sam) / Jashyard-directed PM queue
items.acceptance_criteria: safe_io path-guard routes any test/sim write to logs/test_artifacts/ or logs/sim/ (never production errors.jsonl); every errors.jsonl write carries timestamp+error_type+source; mode field enforced; verified by a sim-write drill that does NOT touch production logs.

items.title: [STRATEGIC] Market-Hours Uptime Heartbeat + Page-on-Down
items.description: ROOT-CAUSE FIX for the #1 PnL-relevant failure mode. The 06-12 zero-entry day was NOT a code bug: the Cowork app was CLOSED during market hours, so R5/R6 deferred and fired post-window. A Sunday-5pm prep check was added, but there is NO in-window detection that the app/routines are actually live. This item adds a lightweight heartbeat that confirms each entry routine fired within its window on each open day and pages Jashyard (Slack + email) FAST if a window is missed (detect within minutes, not at EOD). Distinct from RM-074 (failover) and RM-061 (simplify schedule): this is an uptime SLA + alerting layer. Directly accelerates Phase 1 because every missed favorable session is a lost scored signal toward the 30-signal gate.
items.source: Jordan Strategic Session 2026-06-13 — R8 INS-001 + 06-12 root cause
items.acceptance_criteria: A heartbeat checks, per open day, that each entry routine (R1/R3/R4/R5/R6) logged a start within ±10 min of its window; a missed window posts a Slack alert + email to Jashyard within 15 min of the window close; verified by a drill that simulates a missed window. No engine/scoring/gate change.

items.title: [STRATEGIC] Notification Delivery Reliability (Gmail MCP) — 5 email failures/wk
items.description: R8 reports email_failures=5 this week (Gmail MCP auth/scope). Email + Slack are the ONLY ways Jashyard learns the app/routines are down — if notifications silently fail, the uptime risk (RM-079) compounds: a missed window with a failed alert = invisible lost session. Need: root-cause the Gmail MCP failures (auth/scope/rate), add a delivery-confirmation + retry, and a fallback to Slack-only with an explicit 'email degraded' flag in runs.jsonl so degraded notification is visible, not silent.
items.source: Jordan Strategic Session 2026-06-13 — R8 research_question (5 email_failures)
items.acceptance_criteria: Gmail MCP failure root cause documented in TECH_NOTES.md; routines confirm send-success and retry once; on persistent failure, runs.jsonl carries email_status='degraded' and Slack remains authoritative; email_failures trend tracked in R8. Target 0 silent failures over next 5 sessions.

items.title: Phase-Gate Metric Definitions — Phase-1-Progress vs Condition-1 Separation
items.description: Measurement-integrity fix before data accrues Monday. Today Phase 1 ('10 engine-scored sessions') and going-live Condition 1 ('30 gated NATURAL signals per model, floor excluded') are easy to conflate. Floor entries (entry_type='floor') and gated-but-scored attempts count toward Phase-1 PROGRESS but must NEVER count toward Condition-1's 30 natural signals. Codify the two distinct counters + definitions in improvement_phases.json and METRIC-DICTIONARY.md so the live gate cannot be accidentally satisfied by floor trades.
